name: satrank
description: Route reliability oracle for Lightning Network payments. GO/NO-GO decisions with personalized pathfinding, trust scores for 17,000+ nodes, probe-verified reachability. Built for autonomous AI agents.
author: SatRank

SATRANK_API_KEY.description: API key for write operations (report, attestation). Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32

tools.name: decide
tools.description: GO/NO-GO decision with success probability. Returns go (boolean), successRate (0-1), verdict (SAFE/RISKY/UNKNOWN), pathfinding, survival prediction, and risk profile.

tools.name: ping
tools.description: Real-time reachability check via QueryRoutes. Returns whether a Lightning node is reachable right now, hops, and fees. Free.

tools.name: report
tools.description: Report a transaction outcome (success/failure/timeout). Free. Weighted by reporter trust score. Preimage verification gives 2x weight bonus.

tools.name: get_profile
tools.description: Full agent profile: score, components, report statistics, probe uptime, rank, evidence, flags, survival prediction.

tools.name: get_agent_score
tools.description: Detailed trust score with 5 components (volume, reputation, seniority, regularity, diversity), evidence, and verification URLs.

tools.name: get_verdict
tools.description: SAFE/RISKY/UNKNOWN verdict with risk profile, personal trust graph, and personalized pathfinding.

tools.name: get_batch_verdicts
tools.description: Batch verdict for up to 100 agents in one call.

tools.name: get_network_stats
tools.description: Global network statistics: nodes probed, phantom rate, reachable count, probes/24h.

tools.name: get_top_movers
tools.description: Agents with the biggest score changes over 7 days.

tools.name: submit_attestation
tools.description: Submit a trust attestation after a transaction. Requires SATRANK_API_KEY.
